Template_Code:
graph TB
    A["Top Level"] --> B["Level 2A"]
    A --> C["Level 2B"]
    A --> D["Level 2C"]
    B --> B1["Detail 1"]
    B --> B2["Detail 2"]
    C --> C1["Detail 3"]
    D --> D1["Detail 4"]
    classDef main fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#388E3C,color:#fff
    classDef mid fill:#2196F3,stroke:#1565C0,color:#fff
    classDef leaf fill:#FF9800,stroke:#F57C00,color:#fff
    class A main
    class B,C,D mid
    class B1,B2,C1,D1 leaf

graph LR
    A["Input"] --> B["Step 1"]
    B --> C["Step 2"]
    C --> D["Step 3"]
    D --> E["Output"]
    style A fill:#4CAF50,color:#fff
    style E fill:#F44336,color:#fff

graph TB
    A{"Decision Point"} -->|Condition A| B["Option A"]
    A -->|Condition B| C["Option B"]
    B --> D{"Sub-decision"}
    D -->|Yes| E["Result 1"]
    D -->|No| F["Result 2"]
    C --> G["Result 3"]
    style A fill:#FF9800,color:#fff
    style D fill:#FF9800,color:#fff

sequenceDiagram
    participant H as Host (CPU)
    participant D as Device (GPU)
    H->>D: cudaMemcpy (H2D)
    activate D
    D->>D: kernel<<<grid block>>>()
    D-->>H: cudaMemcpy (D2H)
    deactivate D
    H->>H: Process results
Keywords: sequence time interaction transfer API call protocol

Template_Code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle
    Idle --> Ready: Scheduled
    Ready --> Running: Dispatched
    Running --> Stalled: Memory wait
    Stalled --> Ready: Data arrived
    Running --> Completed: Done
    Completed --> [*]
Keywords: state transition lifecycle status change FSM

Template_Code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant T0 as Thread 0
    participant T1 as Thread 1
    participant SM as Shared Mem
    T0->>SM: Write data[0]
    T1->>SM: Write data[1]
    Note over T0,T1: __syncthreads()
    T0->>SM: Read data[1]
    T1->>SM: Read data[0]
Keywords: sync barrier synchronization thread communication shared
